reviews.comment:
New branch of Coffee Island in our neighbourhood now! They have an excellent vibe about the place.
Great coffee options along with great snack items. Perfect hangout place with friends or family.
Paid parking available like in M Block market GK-II. The staff are young and cool. Interior decors is nice and chic. Wireless chargers are available on some tables. You will find selection of coffee table books as well.
The cold coffee options are great and they come in big sizes (even the medium size).
Definitely an enjoyable place to enjoy coffee and company. 👍

reviewReply.comment: So glad you enjoyed the Coffee Island vibe! We’re all about great brews, chill spaces, and good company. Looking forward to welcoming you back soon.
